name: @pocketjs/aot
description: Ahead-of-time partial-evaluation pipeline: author tile-based RPGs in TypeScript/JSX, ship GBA-native tiles, sprites, palettes and bytecode. A first-class PocketJS architecture alongside @pocketjs/framework.

scripts.build: bun run assets && bun compiler/cli.ts build demo/game.tsx --out dist/pocket-town.gba
scripts.build:gb: bun run assets && bun compiler/cli.ts build demo/game.tsx --target gb --out dist/pocket-town.gb
scripts.build:nes: bun run assets && bun compiler/cli.ts build demo/game.tsx --target nes --out dist/pocket-town.nes
scripts.shendiao: bun run assets:shendiao && bun compiler/cli.ts build demo-shendiao/game.tsx --out dist/shendiao.gba && bun compiler/cli.ts build demo-shendiao/game.tsx --target gb --out dist/shendiao.gb && bun compiler/cli.ts build demo-shendiao/game.tsx --target nes --out dist/shendiao.nes
scripts.test:multi: bun run assets && bun test/e2e-multi.ts gba gb nes
scripts.test:all: bun run test:multi && bun run test:shendiao
